common.logoHint: PNG or JPG, max 5 MB. Shown on the shared login link.
common.logoInvalid: The file must be an image
common.name: Name

landing.heroSubtitle: Tchoucti centralises meetings, contributions, loans, tontines and mutual aid for your group. Designed for diasporas, families and communities.
landing.featuresSubtitle: A comprehensive platform, designed for the reality of African associations.
landing.feature1Desc: Record contributions, donations and attendance in real time during meetings.
landing.feature2Desc: Separate funds, complete ledger, automated reports. No more doubt.
landing.feature3Desc: Automatic schedules, interest, penalties, built-in insurance fund.
landing.feature4Desc: Automatic cycles, beneficiary order, smart reminders.
landing.feature5Desc: Configurable scales for death, birth, illness. Traceable payments.
landing.feature6Desc: A group can host multiple associations, each independent.
landing.rolesSubtitle: From president to treasurer, through censor — everyone has their place.
landing.footerTagline: Designed in Africa for communities worldwide.

shell.chooseAssociationHint: You belong to several associations. Select the one to work on. You can switch later from your profile.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access your Tchoucti space
login.connectionError: Can't reach the server. Check your connection (or that you're on the right address).
login.sessionExpired: Your session has expired, please sign in again.

activate.title: Activate your account
activate.subtitle: Set your password to get started
activate.existingAccount: You already have an account. Confirm to join {org} — your password stays unchanged.

dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Here's an overview of your space.
dashboard.subGroupementAdmin: Steer your group and its associations.
dashboard.subAssociationAdmin: Run your association, its members and meetings.
dashboard.noMeetingsDesc: Create your first meeting to get started.
dashboard.noActivityDesc: Your association's actions will appear here.
dashboard.mySharesDesc: Deposits + shared returns I benefit from.
dashboard.noAssociationsYetDesc: Create your first association to start.

admin.title: Platform Administration
admin.subtitle: Manage groups, users and global settings.

meeting.title: Meetings
meeting.subtitle: Upcoming scheduled meetings
meeting.emptyDesc: Create your first meeting to get started.
meeting.newMeetingSubtitle: Schedule a meeting for your association
meeting.requiredFields: Title, association and date are required
meeting.generateDesc: Pre-create planned meetings based on the configured cadence (settings → meetings).
meeting.generateStartHint: If empty, we continue after the latest known meeting.
meeting.bannerOngoing: Meeting in progress — entries are active
meeting.noEntriesHint: Use the form above to add entries
meeting.tontineZeroConfirmDesc: Confirm this member gave nothing (0) for “{activity}” at this meeting.
meeting.tontineObligationBlock: Each tontine must be decided (gave all, an amount, or nothing) before saving.
meeting.rescheduleDesc: If a tontine round is attached to this meeting, its date is adjusted automatically. Other meetings stay on their date.
meeting.cancelConfirmDesc: The meeting status becomes 'cancelled'. If a tontine round is attached, it will be re-attached to the next planned meeting (or a new one will be created per cadence).
meeting.confirmCloseDesc: All draft entries will be validated. The meeting can no longer be edited.
meeting.noActivities: No visible activity — configure them in settings.
meeting.editConfirmDesc: Data was already entered for {name}. If you confirm, the previous entry will be replaced and this change will be logged in the meeting log.
meeting.notesPlaceholder: Decisions made, debates, next actions… This is included in the PDF minutes upon closing.
meeting.notesHint: Visible to all members once the meeting is closed and the report is generated.
meeting.memberNotesPlaceholder: Decisions, exchanges or observations specific to this member. Included in the minutes upon closing.

finance.title: Finance
finance.description: Global balance, funds, movements and breakdown.

groupement.title: Group
groupement.subtitleOwner: Configure your group and its team.
groupement.suspendConfirmDesc: Admins and members won't be able to sign in until reactivation.
groupement.activateConfirmDesc: Access will be restored for all group accounts.
groupement.adminsDesc: People who can manage this group.
groupement.inviteAdminDesc: An activation email will be sent. The link expires in 7 days.
groupement.inviteLinkDesc: If the email doesn't arrive, share this link manually:
groupement.removeAdminConfirmDesc: This person will lose admin access to the group.
groupement.transferConfirmDesc: {name} will become the owner. You'll become a co-administrator.

association.title: Associations
association.listSubtitleSuper: Every association hosted on the platform.
association.detailSubtitle: Manage this association, its members and meetings.
association.createDesc: Create an association within the group.
association.currencyLockedHint: Currency is locked because the association already has financial activity.
association.loginLinkHint: Share this link with members: it opens the association's branded login page directly.
association.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits and dashes only
association.membersComingSoon: Member management lands in the next step.

member.title: Members
member.subtitle: Members of the association.
member.centralSubtitle: All members across every association of the group.
member.inviteDesc: An activation email will be sent. The link expires in 7 days.
member.suspendConfirmDesc: {name} will lose access to the association until reactivated.
member.activationLinkDesc: If the email doesn't arrive, share this link:

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Bylaws, internal rules and other association records.
documents.emptyDesc: Add the bylaws, internal rules, etc.
documents.missingFields: A title and a file are required.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Your account and preferences.
settings.name: Association name
settings.currencyLockedHint: Currency is locked because the association already has financial activity.
settings.horizonHint: Number of upcoming meetings kept automatically (1–60).
settings.remindersEnabledDesc: Send a reminder to members ahead of each meeting.
settings.remindersDaysBeforeHint: Comma-separated list. E.g., 7, 1 = reminder D-7 and D-1.
settings.memberSeesAllDesc: If on, a member sees all members' attendance and entries on a meeting page. Otherwise they only see their own and the report.

tontine.title: Tontines
tontine.subtitle: The association's rotating tontines and their cycles.
tontine.createDesc: Configure the tontine and pick the participants of its 1st cycle.
tontine.emptyDesc: Create your first tontine to start the rotation.
tontine.name: Tontine name
tontine.participantsHint: Pick members in the desired payout order.
tontine.beneficiariesPerRoundHint: A round can be shared between several beneficiaries who split the pot equally.
tontine.isMandatoryHint: If disabled, active members not picked as beneficiaries are opted out automatically.
tontine.excludedHint: {count} active member(s) will be excluded from this tontine.
tontine.payoutConfirmTitle: Pay out the pot to the beneficiary?
tontine.payoutConfirmDesc: Round {round} will be marked paid out and the cycle moves to the next round.
tontine.payoutConfirmDescMoney: Round {round}'s payout will be set PENDING: the money only leaves once the treasurer validates.
tontine.reorderDesc: Reorder the beneficiaries of rounds not yet paid out (move up/down). Rounds already paid or in progress stay unchanged.
tontine.cancelConfirmDesc: The cycle will be marked cancelled. Irreversible.
tontine.noMembers: No members in the association — invite members first.
tontine.beneficiaryPaysHint: If enabled, the round's beneficiary also pays their contribution.
tontine.cyclesCount: {count, plural, =0 {No cycle} one {# cycle} other {# cycles}}
tontine.roundAmountHint: Amount each member contributes at every meeting.
tontine.participantsOptionalHint: Optional: create the tontine without members and add them later from its config. Otherwise pick them in the desired payout order.
tontine.noParticipantsNote: No participants: the tontine will be created as a draft. You'll add members later from its configuration.
tontine.draftParticipantsHint: Pick members in payout order, save, then start the cycle. The meetings are then created automatically.
tontine.renameNameDesc: Edit the label of this name/share.
tontine.configSubtitle: Add members and their names/shares. Possible as long as meetings have not started.
tontine.cycleStartedHint: You can no longer add a member once the cycle has started. You can still rename names from the tontine page.
tontine.noDraftCycleHint: There is no cycle being configured for this tontine.
tontine.configureFromButton: Add members and their names from the Configure button.
tontine.assetQuantityHint: Number of units each member contributes per round.
tontine.targetRoundsHint: Winners per session = participants ÷ number of sessions.

finance.title: Finance
finance.subtitle: Association treasury and breakdown by fund.
finance.newMovementDesc: Cash-in, cash-out or transfer between funds.
finance.emptyMovementsDesc: Cash-in and cash-out will appear here.
finance.voidConfirmDesc: Balances will be recomputed. Provide a reason.

aidHistory.subtitleMember: History of your contributions to aid cases.
aidHistory.subtitleBureau: Every contribution recorded at a meeting, by member and aid type.
aidHistory.empty: No contribution recorded for this period.

socialAid.title: Social aid
socialAid.subtitle: Assistance cases from the social fund.
socialAid.declareDesc: The configured scale sets the proposed amount.
socialAid.approveConfirmDesc: The scale amount will be used. You can then pay it out.
socialAid.payoutConfirmDesc: The payout will be set PENDING: the money only leaves once the treasurer validates.
socialAid.editDesc: Adjust the aid case details. Unavailable once paid out.
socialAid.perMemberDebit: Each member will be debited {amount} (amount ÷ {n} members).
socialAid.perEventNote: One-off contribution: each member will contribute {amount} at the next session; the collection will be given to you.

loan.title: Loans
loan.subtitle: Loan requests and repayment schedules.
loan.requestDesc: The board will approve the request and generate the schedule.
loan.loanTypeHint: Rate {rate}%/mo · max {max} months — inherited from the chosen type.
loan.repayDesc: Allocated to the oldest installments first.
loan.approveConfirmDesc: The schedule will be computed and locked.
loan.disburseConfirmDesc: The disbursement will be set PENDING: the money only leaves once the treasurer validates.
loan.noLoanTypes: No loan type configured. Ask the administrator to create one.

configCaisses.title: Funds
configCaisses.subtitle: All funds of the association: general, insurance, tontines, and custom funds (projects, personal savings, collective).
configCaisses.notAdmin: Only the admin can configure funds.
configCaisses.intro: Each fund is a virtual account inside the treasury. System funds (general, insurance, tontines) are auto-created and not deletable — only name and description are editable.
configCaisses.addDesc: Pick a category and rules. The accounting fund is auto-created.
configCaisses.systemEditableHint: System fund: only name, description and active flag are editable.
configCaisses.deleteConfirmDesc: Fund "{name}" and its backing accounting fund will be removed (only if the balance is zero).
configCaisses.sectionSharedHint: Caisses whose collected interest is redistributed to contributors pro rata of their cumulative deposits.
configCaisses.sharedModeHint: When enabled, interest received via loans on this caisse stays in it and is redistributed at each period close to contributors pro rata of their deposits.
configCaisses.distributionPeriodHint: How often collected interest is redistributed.
configCaisses.withdrawalModeHint: When contributors can pull their deposits out.
configCaisses.editFromListHint: To change settings, go back to the caisses list and click the edit icon.
configCaisses.name: Name
configCaisses.categoryHint: Drives how the fund works and who can deposit/withdraw.
configCaisses.activeHint: When off, the fund no longer appears in new meetings but stays auditable.
configCaisses.recurringHint: A pre-filled row appears at every meeting for every member.
configCaisses.recurringAmountFreeHint: Optional. Leave empty (or 0) for a free amount: each member contributes whatever they want each meeting.
configCaisses.memberRequiredHint: When on, every member must contribute. Missing entries flagged at close.
configCaisses.objectiveHint: Target amount. Project funds auto-close once reached.
configCaisses.memberRequiredAmountNote: The expected amount is the one “collected each meeting” above. A contribution can be mandatory without being fixed (free amount).
configCaisses.memberMinBalanceHint: Each member must keep at least this amount in the caisse. Below it, they are in the “red zone”. 0 = no minimum.
configCaisses.memberMinBalanceLegend: In red: members whose balance is below {amount}.

configTontines.title: Tontines
configTontines.subtitle: All tontines of the association — ongoing, completed or cancelled.
configTontines.notAdmin: Only the admin can configure tontines.
configTontines.intro: A tontine is a rotation cycle where each member contributes a fixed amount at every round and the pot goes to one or more beneficiaries. You can have several tontines running in parallel, each with its own isolated fund.
configTontines.emptyDesc: Create your first tontine to start a rotation.
configTontines.cancelConfirmDesc: The cycle is marked cancelled. Unpaid rounds can no longer be paid out. Already-collected contributions stay in the dedicated fund — transfer them out manually if needed.
configTontines.cyclesLabel: {count, plural, =0 {No cycle} one {# cycle} other {# cycles}}

configAids.title: Social aid configuration
configAids.subtitle: Enable social aid and define the covered types (member contribution, ceiling, delay).
configAids.notAdmin: Only the admin can configure social aid.
configAids.enableHint: When off, no new declaration can be filed. Open cases keep running.
configAids.disabledPreview: Social aid is off. Enable the module above to configure types and accept declarations.
configAids.intro: Each aid type covers a specific event (birth, death…), the contribution each member pays, the ceiling paid to the beneficiary and the declaration delay.
configAids.emptyDesc: Add at least one type so members can declare cases.
configAids.noSourceCaisse: Create a collective (non-project) fund first to back aid with it.
configAids.typeNameExample: E.g. Parent death — Birth — Serious illness — Marriage
configAids.sourceCaisseHint: Fund receiving contributions and paying out to the beneficiary. Typically the insurance fund.
configAids.temporaryCaisseHint: No fixed caisse to pick: a caisse in the beneficiary's name is opened automatically when each request is approved. It collects contributions and finances its payout.
configAids.contributionExample: E.g. {amount} per member when the aid is triggered.
configAids.ceilingExample: E.g. {amount} — maximum paid to the beneficiary.
configAids.recurringHint: If on, contribution is collected at every meeting while the case is open. Otherwise: one-shot at approval.
configAids.maxClaimsHint: Maximum number of accepted claims per member over a sliding 12-month window.
configAids.delayHint: Number of days after the event during which declaration is accepted.
configAids.previewText: Each member contributes {contribution}. Beneficiary receives up to {ceiling}. Limit: {year} claim(s) per year per member, declarable up to {delay} days after the event.
configAids.fundingModeHint: Where the money paid to the beneficiary comes from.
configAids.fundingInsuranceHint: Each member keeps a minimum in their personal insurance caisse. On each aid, every member's caisse (except the requester) is debited by their share; the member then refills it back to the minimum.
configAids.objectiveHint: Total amount to raise for the beneficiary. Each member's share = objective ÷ (number of members − 1), excluding the requester.
configAids.objectiveExample: E.g. {amount} split among the other members
configAids.objectivePreview: Objective {amount} split equally across members other than the requester.
configAids.amountModeHint: Fixed ceiling paid, or an objective split across members.
configAids.insuranceMinimumHint: Minimum amount each member must keep in their personal insurance caisse.
configAids.insurancePreview: Each member keeps {min} in their insurance caisse; refill expected within {days} days after a debit.
configAids.refillPeriodHint: Time allowed to refill the caisse back to the minimum after a debit. Beyond that, the state is unfavorable.
configAids.sourceModeHint: Where does the money given to the applicant come from?
configAids.collectiveCaisseHint: The whole amount is taken from this shared caisse.
configAids.noCollectiveCaisse: No collective caisse. Create one in the caisses first.
configAids.individualCaisseHint: The amount is divided by the number of members; each member is debited their share from their personal caisse.
configAids.noPersonalCaisse: No individual caisse. Create a “personal” caisse first.
configAids.amountToGiveHint: Amount paid to the member who applies.
configAids.previewCollective: The applicant receives {amount}, fully taken from the collective caisse.
configAids.previewIndividual: The applicant receives {amount}, split and debited from each member's individual caisse.
configAids.perEventHint: No source caisse: at the session after the request, each member contributes; the collection is given to the beneficiary.
configAids.perEventAmountHint: Amount each member contributes. 0 = free (each gives what they want).
configAids.perEventRequiredHint: If on, each member must contribute; otherwise optional.
configAids.previewPerEvent: Each member contributes {amount} at the next session; the collection is given to the applicant.

configLoans.title: Loan configuration
configLoans.subtitle: Enable loans for this association and define available types (eligibility, rate, duration, source fund).
configLoans.notAdmin: Only the admin can configure loans.
configLoans.enableHint: When off, no new request can be filed. Ongoing loans keep running.
configLoans.disabledPreview: Loans are off. Enable the module above to configure types and accept requests.
configLoans.intro: Each loan type carries its own rules: source fund for the principal, monthly interest rate, max duration, eligibility constraints.
configLoans.emptyDesc: Add at least one type so members can request loans.
configLoans.noSourceCaisse: Create a collective (non-project) fund first to back loans with it.
configLoans.typeNameExample: E.g. Standard loan — Emergency loan — Housing credit
configLoans.sourceCaisseHint: Fund the principal is drawn from (typically the general fund). Project funds cannot serve as a source.
configLoans.lateFeeExample: E.g. 1.0 = +1% per month of delay on the instalment.
configLoans.maxDurationExample: E.g. 12 = repayable over up to 12 months.
configLoans.maxSimultaneousHint: Max ongoing loans of this type per member.
configLoans.noDefaultHint: Excludes members with a recorded payment default.
configLoans.previewText: Rate {rate}%/month over {duration} months max. Limit: {simultaneous} simultaneous and {year} new per year per member.

onboarding.title: Set up your association
onboarding.subtitle: A few steps to get your association running. You can revisit each section later.
onboarding.notAdmin: Only the association administrator can configure.
onboarding.errorName: Name must be at least 2 characters.
onboarding.stepAssociationDesc: Legal info, adhesion criteria, fees and documents.
onboarding.introAssociation: These details show up to members and appear in every meeting report. Editable later from settings.
onboarding.name: Name
onboarding.typeHint: The legal nature drives a few default labels (contribution, share capital…).
onboarding.currencyExample: Currency used for all of the association's amounts.
onboarding.feeHint: Amount a new member must pay to join.
onboarding.feeExample: E.g. {amount} — charged once when activating the account.
onboarding.feePreview: Each new member must pay {amount} to join — visible in their history.
onboarding.criteriaHint: Multiple criteria allowed: age, gender, location, profession… All checked at invitation time.
onboarding.docsHint: Bylaws, internal rules, registration receipt, other supporting documents.
onboarding.docPickFile: Pick a file (PDF, image, max 20 MB)
onboarding.docMissing: Pick a file and give it a title.
onboarding.stepCaissesDesc: A general fund already exists. Add funds for your projects, personal savings, or shared pools.
onboarding.introCaisses: A fund is a virtual account inside your treasury. System funds (general, tontine) are auto-created. Add your own below.
onboarding.caisseNameExample: E.g. Well Project Fund — Wedding Savings — Family Fund
onboarding.caisseCategoryHint: Drives how the fund works and who can deposit/withdraw.
onboarding.caisseRecurringHint: If on, a pre-filled line appears at every meeting for every member.
onboarding.caisseRecurringAmountFreeHint: Optional. Empty or 0 = free amount each meeting.
onboarding.caisseMemberRequiredHint: If on, every member must contribute this amount. Missing contributions flagged at close.
onboarding.caisseObjectiveHint: Target amount. Once reached, the fund closes (for Project funds) or shows 100%.
onboarding.caissePreviewRecurringText: At every meeting, a line of {amount} will be proposed for each member.
onboarding.caissePreviewFreeText: Free contributions, no ceiling or requirement.
onboarding.stepTontinesDesc: Configure the association tontines (rotation, amount, selection method).
onboarding.stepLoansDesc: Enable loans and define your types (eligibility, rate, duration, source fund).
onboarding.stepAidsDesc: Define aid types (birth, death…) and member contribution.
onboarding.stubLater: This section will be available soon. You can configure it any time from the dashboard.
onboarding.stepTontinesIntro: Create the association's tontines. Each tontine has its own isolated fund and rounds. Create as many as you need, or skip this step.
onboarding.openConfigHint: Opens the dedicated configuration page. Come back here via the banner on top when you're done.
onboarding.inWizardHint: You're in the initial setup wizard.
onboarding.caisseMemberRequiredAmountNote: The expected amount is the one “collected each meeting” above. Can be mandatory without being fixed.
onboarding.caisseMemberMinHint: Each member must keep at least this amount. Below it, they are in the “red zone”.

errors.generic: An error occurred, please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorised to access this page.
errors.notFoundDesc: This page does not exist or has been moved.

myShare.title: My share
myShare.subtitle: Your deposits and shared returns in the caisses where you contribute.
myShare.emptyDesc: You haven't contributed to a shared caisse yet.
myShare.detailSubtitle: Evolution of your deposits and interest received.
myShare.historyEmpty: No distribution has included a share for you yet.

myFinance.title: My contributions
myFinance.subtitle: Your personal financial history in the association.
myFinance.noCaisses: You haven't contributed to any fund yet.

imports.title: Import data
imports.subtitle: Download an Excel template, fill it in, then import it. A preview checks every row before creation.
imports.step1Title: Choose what to import and download the template
imports.step2Title: Fill in the template then import it
imports.dropHint: Click to choose your filled .xlsx file
imports.dropSub: Expected format: the Excel template downloaded above
imports.noRows: No rows to import (the file is empty).
imports.commitHint: Only valid rows will be created; rows with errors are skipped.

forcePassword.title: Change your password
forcePassword.subtitle: For your security, set a new password before continuing.
forcePassword.mismatch: The two passwords do not match.

caissesView.title: Funds
caissesView.subtitle: Fund details and contributors' earnings.
caissesView.emptyDesc: No fund is configured for this association.
caissesView.noContributorsDesc: Nobody has a contribution in this fund yet.
caissesView.gainsHint: Earnings are the interest already distributed (period closings). See the Forecast tab for upcoming interest.
caissesView.noDistributionsDesc: No interest period has been closed yet.

caissePronostics.modeKept: This fund KEEPS its interest (paid to the insurance fund): it is not redistributed to members.
caissePronostics.modeShared: This fund REDISTRIBUTES its interest to contributors, pro-rata to their contribution.
caissePronostics.noLoansDesc: No active loan is funded by this fund at the moment.

memberActivity.mySubtitle: Your contributions, requests and income over a period.
memberActivity.noMembership: No active membership found for this association.

memberDetail.accessActive: This member has an active account and can log in.
memberDetail.accessPending: The member hasn't activated their account yet. Resend the activation link or copy it.
memberDetail.accessNoEmail: This member has no real email: set their email to send an activation link.
memberDetail.resentLinkOnly: Link generated (email not sent — copy it).
memberDetail.rolesHint: Assign functions to this member. The treasurer validates money-out (loan disbursements, payouts…).
memberDetail.treasurerHint: Can validate money-out and trigger disbursements.

myFinances.noVersementsDesc: You have not made any deposit into a fund yet.
